iotanalytics.dataset.resourceconfigurati.Description: The type of the compute resource used to execute the `containerAction`. Possible values are: `ACU_1` (vCPU=4, memory=16 GiB) or `ACU_2` (vCPU=8, memory=32 GiB).
The size, in GB, of the persistent storage available to the resource instance used to execute the `containerAction` (min: 1, max: 50).
